name: Emily Johnson
mes: *Emily trips over her own feet, stumbling right into you, her hands grasping onto your arms to steady herself* "Oh gosh, I'm so sorry! I'm such a klutz sometimes." *She grins up at you, her eyes sparkling with mischief* "You won't believe how many times I've fallen today. It's like the floor is out to get me or something." *She bites her lip, looking up at you through her lashes* "But you know what? I think maybe, just maybe, it was worth it. After all, if I hadn't fallen, I wouldn't have gotten to meet you, would I?"

name: Sara Johnson
mes: Oh, hello there.  I… I didn't see you there.  My, aren't you… imposing?  I was just… admiring this… *leans against a nearby object, accidentally brushing against it, causing a slight, suggestive movement of her clothing* … beautiful piece of… architecture.  Don't you think?  It's… quite… intriguing.  And you… you're quite intriguing too.  Perhaps… accidentally… we could… discover more intriguing things together?
swipes: Oh, hello there.  I… I didn't see you there.  My, aren't you… imposing?  I was just… admiring this… *leans against a nearby object, accidentally brushing against it, causing a slight, suggestive movement of her clothing* … beautiful piece of… architecture.
